inputs.label: Current Loan Balance
inputs.businessContext: The outstanding principal balance of the existing student loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: The outstanding principal balance of the existing student loan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut öğrenci kredisinin ödenmemiş anapara bakiyesi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Solde du principal impayé du prêt étudiant existant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Saldo principal pendiente del préstamo estudiantil existente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرصيد الأصلي المستحق لقرض الطالب الحالي.

inputs.label: Current Interest Rate (APR)
inputs.businessContext: Annual Percentage Rate of the current loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual Percentage Rate of the current loan.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux annuel effectif global du prêt actuel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de porcentaje anual del préstamo actual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل النسبة المئوية السنوي للقرض الحالي.

inputs.label: Remaining Term
inputs.businessContext: Number of months left on the current loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of months left on the current loan.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mois restants sur le prêt actuel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de meses restantes del préstamo actual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الأشهر المتبقية على القرض الحالي.

inputs.label: New Interest Rate (APR)
inputs.businessContext: Offered APR for the refinanced loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Offered APR for the refinanced loan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden finansman kredisi için sunulan APR.
businessContext_i18n.de: Angebotener APY für den umgeschuldeten Kredit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: TAEG offert pour le prêt refinancé.
businessContext_i18n.es: APR ofrecida para el préstamo refinanciado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل النسبة المئوية السنوي المعروض للقرض المعاد تمويله.

inputs.label: New Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Repayment period for the refinanced loan in months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Repayment period for the refinanced loan in months.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden finanse edilen kredinin ay cinsinden geri ödeme süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rückzahlungszeitraum für den umgeschuldeten Kredit in Monaten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Période de remboursement du prêt refinancé en mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Período de pago del préstamo refinanciado en meses.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فترة السداد للقرض المعاد تمويله بالأشهر.

inputs.label: Origination Fee
inputs.businessContext: One-time fee charged by the lender, expressed as a percentage of the loan balance.

businessContext_i18n.en: One-time fee charged by the lender, expressed as a percentage of the loan balance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Borç veren tarafından alınan, kredi bakiyesinin yüzdesi olarak ifade edilen tek seferlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einmalige Gebühr des Kreditgebers, ausgedrückt als Prozentsatz des Kreditsaldos.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais uniques facturés par le prêteur, exprimés en pourcentage du solde du prêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Comisión única cobrada por el prestamista, expresada como porcentaje del saldo del préstamo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رسوم لمرة واحدة يفرضها المقرض، معبرًا عنها كنسبة مئوية من رصيد القرض.
